title: Mercury | Rechargeable LED Flashlight: Rugged Water Resistant Metal Construction, Super Bright, and Versatile with 4 Lighting Modes, high, Low, Strobe & SOS
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: USB Rechargeable | Convenient USB-C charge port with an included 18650 battery (2000mAh) offering up to 8 hours of use on a single charge
Super Bright & Versatile | Equipped with 4 lighting modes (high, low, strobe, and SOS) and a telescopic zoom for various lighting needs
Durable & Emergency-Ready | Rugged metal body with a beveled head for emergency window breaking; water-resistant for reliable use in all conditions
Smart Indicators | High/low charge LED indicators to monitor battery status and ensure you’re never caught off guard
Enhanced Safety Features | Easy mode cycling with the power button and SOS function for emergency signaling; hold down button to activate SOS flashing
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | USB Rechargeable LED Flashlight, 4-Modes, Rechargeable, Telescopic Zoom, & Water-Resistant Our USB Rechargeable LED Flashlight is designed for reliability and versatility. With a rugged metal body and water resistance, it’s ideal for hiking, camping, or keeping in your car. The flashlight offers four modes—high, low, strobe, and SOS—and features telescopic zoom and a dimmable beam. It’s USB-C rechargeable with a 2000mAh battery providing up to 8 hours of use. The high/low charge indicators and easy mode cycling ensure you're always prepared, while the beveled head is handy for emergency situations. PRODUCT FEATURES: Bright & Versatile | 4 modes (high, low, strobe, SOS) and telescopic zoom. Durable | Rugged metal body, water-resistant, and beveled head for emergencies. USB Rechargeable | USB-C port with 18650 battery (2000mAh) for up to 8 hours of use. Charge Indicators | LED indicators for battery status. Safety Features | Easy mode cycling and SOS function for emergencies. SPECIFICATION: Charge time 8 hours Battery type 18650 Battery capacity 2000mAh Construction: Metal Recharging: USB-C BOX CONTAINS: 1 x Torch 1 x Wrist Strap 1 x 18650 rechargeable battery 1 x USB A to C Cable
